title: JPMorgan’s CIO Sees Leadership Test as AI Fuels Shift
description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. faces a daunting management challenge from artificial intelligence as the bank reaps productivity benefits while racing to contain a new set of risks, Global Chief Information Officer Lori Beer said.

title: SpaceX Is Said to Plan to Buy Startup Cursor 30 Days After IPO
description: SpaceX expects to proceed with its acquisition of artificial intelligence coding startup Cursor 30 days after Elon Musk’s company begins trading publicly, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: What Byron Allen Has Planned for Buzzfeed, Late-Night Show
description: Byron Allen, founder, chair and CEO of Allen Media Group, discusses his plans to turn Buzzfeed into a free-TV super app. Speaking with Romaine Bostick on "Bloomberg The Close," Allen also comments on taking over Stephen Colbert's "Late Show" time slot. (Source: Bloomberg)
